creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: koobs
Date: Sun Oct 20 03:56:01 2013
New Revision: 330967
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/330967

Log:
  net/py-tweepy: Update to 2.1
  
  - Update to 2.1
  - Update pkg-plist
  - Remove indefinite article from COMMENT
  - Tweak COMMENT to more closely match upstream
  - Set an explicit -2.7 USE_PYTHON version
  
  Changes: https://github.com/tweepy/tweepy/blob/2.1/CHANGELOG.md
  
  PR:		ports/182569
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (2 weeks)

Modified:
  head/net/py-tweepy/Makefile
  head/net/py-tweepy/distinfo
  head/net/py-tweepy/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net/py-tweepy/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/py-tweepy/Makefile	Sun Oct 20 03:47:09 2013	(r330966)
+++ head/net/py-tweepy/Makefile	Sun Oct 20 03:56:01 2013	(r330967)
@@ -2,17 +2,17 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	tweepy
-PORTVERSION=	2.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.1
 CATEGORIES=	net python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	clsung@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A library for accessing the Twitter.com API
+COMMENT=	Twitter API library for Python!
 
 LICENSE=	MIT
 
-USE_PYTHON=		yes
+USE_PYTHON=		-2.7
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
 NO_STAGE=	yes

Modified: head/net/py-tweepy/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/py-tweepy/distinfo	Sun Oct 20 03:47:09 2013	(r330966)
+++ head/net/py-tweepy/distinfo	Sun Oct 20 03:56:01 2013	(r330967)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (tweepy-2.0.tar.gz) = a0b3b6ab85e9bd56907a5883085cf208b3bd3a44272fd25e38a8ac1038eb25ad
-SIZE (tweepy-2.0.tar.gz) = 22091
+SHA256 (tweepy-2.1.tar.gz) = 557b598b1c241afbe5efc5f28f46326dc58c85efb42270563b33bca3b6e33fc7
+SIZE (tweepy-2.1.tar.gz) = 26896
